name: Tripadvisor Content API
what_it_does: Tripadvisor Content REST API for travel review and hospitality data platform. Enables AI agents to manage hotel, restaurant, and attraction review data retrieval, handle location search and nearby attraction discovery, access property details including amenities, ratings, and photos, retrieve traveler review content and rating breakdowns, manage price comparison and booking availability data, handle location geo-search for travel itinerary planning, access restaurant menus and cuisine data, retrieve property awards and rankings (Travelers' Choice), manage user-generated content moderation workflows, and integrate Tripadvisor data with travel booking, hospitality management, and tourism platforms.
use_cases: Retrieving property reviews for hospitality intelligence from travel agents
Powering travel recommendation engines from itinerary planning agents
Monitoring competitive review data from hotel management agents
Integrating review content with booking platforms from travel commerce agents
not_for: B2B software reviews without travel and hospitality industry focus
Real-time booking without Tripadvisor partner integration
Healthcare or regulated industry reviews without travel context
best_when: A travel, hospitality, or tourism company using Tripadvisor wants AI agents to automate review retrieval, property search, competitive intelligence, travel recommendations, and booking platform integration.
avoid_when: OPERATIONAL RISK: Review scraping beyond API terms violates Tripadvisor ToS. Review manipulation or fake review generation via API integration is prohibited and can result in account termination. Review data attribution must maintain original Tripadvisor source linkback per API terms.

auth.notes: Tripadvisor Content API uses API key authentication. Per-application key. Developer portal at developer-tripadvisor.com. Partner program approval required for commercial use. No native webhooks. Rate limits per tier. Attribution requirements for displayed content.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier: limited calls/day; commercial use requires partnership agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Commercial partner agreements for higher volume and commercial use cases
pricing.notes: Needham, Massachusetts. Tripadvisor Inc. NASDAQ: TRIP. Founded 2000. Travel review market leader. 1B+ reviews and opinions. 8.7M+ listings. Liberty Tripadvisor Holdings. Hotel meta-search and booking capabilities. Viator experiences subsidiary. TheFork restaurant reservations. Competes with Google Reviews and Yelp for travel reviews.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; tiered by partnership level

known_agent_gotchas: OPERATIONAL RISK: Review content must maintain Tripadvisor attribution linkback per API ToS — do not strip source attribution
Partner program approval — commercial use requires partner program review and approval; not immediate self-serve
Rate limit tiers — free tier is very limited; commercial automation requires partner-level access
Attribution requirements — displayed review content must link back to Tripadvisor per ToS; automated content display must include source
No webhooks — implement polling for new reviews; infrequent polling sufficient as review volume is typically low per property
Content API scope — Tripadvisor Content API covers specific data fields; management operations (responding to reviews) require separate integration
agent_readiness.security_notes: Travel reviews and data. GDPR, CCPA. API key. US. Travel review and hospitality data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Travel review data. GDPR, CCPA. API key. US. Hotel and travel review data.
